docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KENNETH MILLER AND DEFENDANT CARDINAL VOLKSWAGON. DEFENDANT CARDINAL VOLKSWAGON'S REPRESENTATIVE, BRIAN CLINTON, AGREES TO BE HEARD HERE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY INSTEAD OF MONTEREY COUNTY. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARDINAL VW SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $880.00 FILED BY MILLER, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT CARDINAL VW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT CARDINAL VW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED AUG-25-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARDINAL VW
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CARDINAL VW
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
